zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen是Berthold Von Wildberg和Miss Von Auhausen的女兒，於1183年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格可萊斯 卡爾福維爾德格。她和Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg至少有9個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1220年9月15日在德國賀林根藍德可萊斯 史馬爾卡爾登-梅寧根亨內格享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen是Berthold Von Wildberg和Miss Von Auhausen的女儿，于1183年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格可萊斯 卡爾福維爾德格。她和Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg至少有9个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1220年9月15日在德国賀林根藍德可萊斯 史馬爾卡爾登-梅寧根亨內格享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilderberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Germany and Switzerland.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen was born in 1183, in Wildberg, Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Germany as the daughter of Berthold Von Wildberg and Miss Von Auhausen. She had at least 9 sons and 5 daughters with Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg. She died on 15 September 1220, in Henneberg, Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thuringia, Germany, at the age of 37.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringenは1183年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグクレイス カルウウィルドバーグでBerthold Von WildbergとMiss Von Auhausenの娘として生まれた。彼女はGraf Poppo VII von Hennebergとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1220年9月15日にドイツスuリンジェンランドクレイス スチマルカルデン-メイニンジェンヘネバーグで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen(은)는 1183년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 크레이스 캘w 윌드버그에서 Berthold Von Wildberg(와)과 Miss Von Auhausen의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 9월 15일 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 슈마캘데-인잉 헨버그에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen nasceu em 1183, em Wildberg, Kreis Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha filha de Berthold Von Wildberg e Miss Von Auhausen. Ela teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas com Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg. Ela faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1220, em Henneberg, Landkreis Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thüringen, Alemanha, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen родилась в 1183 г. в местности уаилдбирг, крис калв, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия. Её родителей звали Berthold Von Wildberg и Miss Von Auhausen. У неё было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg. Она умерла 15 сентября 1220 г. в местности хеннебирг, ландкрис щмалкалден-мининген, тuринген, Германия в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen nació en 1183, en Wildberg, Kreis Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania como hija de Berthold Von Wildberg y Miss Von Auhausen. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas con Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1220, en Henneberg, Landkreis Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thüringen, Alemania, a la edad de 37 años.
